name: beehiiv-add-to-automation
description: Enroll a subscriber into a Beehiiv automation journey. Use for upsell sequences, premium onboarding, win-back campaigns, and referral reward flows. The automation must have an active 'Add by API' trigger.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key').

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxx...'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

AUTOMATION_ID.description: Beehiiv automation ID (e.g. 'auto_xxx...'). The automation must have an 'Add by API' trigger active. Use beehiiv-list-automations to discover IDs. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

SUBSCRIPTION_ID.description: Subscription ID to enroll (e.g. 'sub_xxx...'). Provide either this or EMAIL — not both. Use '{{subscription_id}}' to pull from an upstream beehiiv-get-subscriber node. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

EMAIL.description: Email address to enroll. Provide either this or SUBSCRIPTION_ID — not both. Supports {{key}} template interpolation (e.g. '{{email}}').

DOUBLE_OPT_OVERRIDE.description: Override the publication's double opt-in setting for this enrollment. 'off' activates immediately — use for subscribers already confirmed.

setup_instructions.title: Create an automation with 'Add by API' trigger
setup_instructions.detail: In your Beehiiv dashboard, go to Automations > New Automation. Add a trigger of type 'Add by API'. Configure the email sequence (upsell pitch, premium onboarding, win-back, etc.). Activate the automation.

setup_instructions.title: Find the automation ID
setup_instructions.detail: Use a beehiiv-list-automations node or call GET https://api.beehiiv.com/v2/publications/{pubId}/automations with your API key. Copy the 'id' field (auto_xxx...) for the automation you want.

setup_instructions.title: Chain with beehiiv-get-subscriber
setup_instructions.detail: A common pattern: [trigger] → [beehiiv-get-subscriber] → [condition: subscription_tier == 'free'] → [beehiiv-add-to-automation: upsell sequence]. Use '{{subscription_id}}' as SUBSCRIPTION_ID to pass the upstream subscriber's ID.
